headline: Pfizer (PFE) Expands China Partnership With SINOPHARM Around Diflucan And Future Launches
summary: Pfizer and SINOPHARM have entered into a new partnership to promote antifungal drug Diflucan in China. The collaboration also includes plans to work together on future Pfizer product launches in the Chinese market. The agreement focuses on supply chain optimization, resource integration, and improving commercial execution across China. Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) is using this new agreement with SINOPHARM to deepen its presence in one of the world’s most important pharmaceutical markets. With the...
